compiled_state.title: Architect-foundation should provide recommendations rather than only asking questions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: /dso:architect-foundation currently only asks questions and records answers, but never synthesizes what it has learned into concrete recommendations. After the Socratic dialogue phase, the skill should leverage its understanding of the project (from conversation + codebase exploration + domain knowledge) to propose specific enforcement scaffolding, architectural guardrails, and configuration choices — explaining why each recommendation fits the project's particular context. The user should be able to accept, reject, or discuss each recommendation rather than being expected to specify everything themselves.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
